response.justification: This candidate possesses extensive software development experience across various technologies and has a strong general engineering background, as evidenced by his diverse roles and open-source contributions. However, the resume lacks the mandatory "strong hands-on C++ development experience (5-10 years)"—showing only 6 months almost a decade ago—and specific domain expertise in Fixed Income or Capital Markets is not apparent. These critical gaps make him unsuitable for this specialized C++ Capital Markets role.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience across multiple platforms.
Strong background in modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD, crafting).
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies and contribute to diverse projects.
concerns: Minimal and outdated explicit C++ development experience, falling far short of the 5-10 year mandatory requirement.
Lack of specific domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
No clear evidence of strong SQL experience with SQL Server or Oracle.
